Zarahemla. The name Zarahemla is taken from the Book of Mormon. Zarahemla was the name of the leader of a people that "came out from Jerusalem at the time that Zedekiah, king of Judah, was carried away captive into Babylon" (Omni 1:15). The place in America where they settled was called the land of Zarahemla. (Joseph Fielding Mc Conkie and Craig J. Ostler, Revelations of the Restoration)

Zarahemla. The name Zarahemla is taken from the Book of Mormon. Zarahemla was the name of the leader of a people that "came out from Jerusalem at the time that Zedekiah, king of Judah, was carried away captive into Babylon" (Omni 1:15). The place in America where they settled was called the land of Zarahemla. (Joseph Fielding Mc Conkie and Craig J. Ostler, Revelations of the Restoration)
